mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEWS (REVIEW_NO, MEMBER_NO, STAGE_NO, REVIEW_CONTENT, REVIEW_RATING) VALUES (SEQ_REVIEWS_NO.NEXTVAL, #{memberNo}, #{stageNo}, #{reviewContent}, #{reviewRating})
mapper.select: SELECT R.REVIEW_NO, R.MEMBER_NO, M.MEMBER_EMAIL, R.STAGE_NO, R.REVIEW_CONTENT, R.REVIEW_RATING, TO_CHAR(R.REVIEW_WRITE_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REVIEW_WRITE_DATE FROM REVIEWS R JOIN MEMBER M ON R.MEMBER_NO = M.MEMBER_NO WHERE R.STAGE_NO = #{stageNo} AND R.REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N' ORDER BY R.REVIEW_WRITE_DATE DESC
SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(REVIEW_RATING), 1), 0) FROM REVIEWS WHERE STAGE_NO = #{stageNo} AND REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N' AND REVIEW_RATING > 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEWS WHERE STAGE_NO = #{stageNo} AND REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'N'
SELECT MEMBER_NO FROM REVIEWS WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEWS SET REVIEW_CONTENT = #{reviewContent}, REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo}
UPDATE REVIEWS SET REVIEW_DEL_FL = 'Y', REVIEW_UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REVIEW_NO = #{reviewNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT(REPORT_NO, REPORT_REASON, REPORT_DETAIL, REPORT_DATE, REPORT_STATUS, REPORTER_NO, REPORTED_NO, REVIEW_NO) VALUES(SEQ_REPORT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{reportReason}, #{reportDetail}, SYSDATE, 'PENDING', #{reporterNo}, #{reportedNo}, #{reviewNo})
